description: This file is the main entry point and core implementation of the Flutter-based Tic Tac Toe app. It includes widget definitions for the game interface, game logic, state management, and UI styling.

classes.name: TicTacToeApp
classes.description: Root widget that sets up MaterialApp with theme and home screen.

classes.name: TicTacToeScreen
classes.description: Main game screen widget, managing game state and UI.

classes.name: _TicTacToeScreenState
classes.description: State class for TicTacToeScreen, implementing game logic and UI updates.

classes.name: _StatusCard
classes.description: Widget showing game status, current player, winner, or draw info.

classes.name: _TurnPill
classes.description: UI component indicating active player turn.

classes.name: _BoardGrid
classes.description: Displays the tic-tac-toe grid with interactive tiles.

classes.name: _BoardTile
classes.description: Represents individual grid cell, handling tap and display.

classes.name: _WinResult
classes.description: Data structure for storing game winner and winning line.

classes.name: _RetroColors
classes.description: Defines the color palette used for styling the UI.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Entry point; initializes the Flutter app.

methods.name: _resetBoard
methods.description: Resets the game board and state for a new game.

methods.name: _newGame
methods.description: Starts a new game by resetting board state.

methods.name: _handleTap
methods.description: Handles user taps on grid cells, updating game state.

methods.name: _checkWinner
methods.description: Evaluates the board to determine if a player has won.
